items.name_en: Brand Selected GG Mini Bag inspired by the styling of Gucci's iconic travel bag. Crafted from canvas, this bag features striped webbing handles and a detachable shoulder strap, reinterpreting classic brand elements and paying tribute to the brand's long heritage in luggage.
items.name_cn:
Brand Selected GG Mini Bag inspired by the styling of Gucci's iconic travel bag. Crafted from canvas, this bag features striped webbing handles and a detachable shoulder strap, reinterpreting classic brand elements and paying tribute to the brand's long heritage in luggage.
Beige and brown GG canvas
Brown leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Handle (10cm high)
Detachable adjustable leather shoulder strap (50cm high; length: 101.5cm)
Zipper closure
Model: 859975.
Dimensions: 20cm (W) x 13cm (H) x 13cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.4kg
Color: Apricot canvas/Brown.
Made in Italy
